basic_details.post_name: Field Engineer, Programme Associate (Finance and Accounts), Programme Associate (Administration and Data Management)
basic_details.short_information: Meghalaya State Watershed and Wasteland Development Agency (MSWWDA North Garo Hills) Field Engineer, Programme Associate (Finance and Accounts), Programme Associate (Administration and Data Management) Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website of the Meghalaya State Watershed and Wasteland Development Agency. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the MSWWDA North Garo Hills Field Engineer, Programme Associate (Finance and Accounts), Programme Associate (Administration and Data Management) Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: MSWWDA North Garo Hills Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MSWWDA North Garo Hills Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: MSWWDA North Garo Hills Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MSWWDA North Garo Hills?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for MSWWDA North Garo Hills recruitment is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts announced by MSWWDA North Garo Hills?
faq.answer: MSWWDA North Garo Hills has announced vacancies for Field Engineer, Programme Associate (Finance and Accounts), and Programme Associate (Administration and Data Management) posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the various posts by MSWWDA North Garo Hills.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Programme Associate posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for Programme Associate (Finance and Accounts) and Programme Associate (Administration and Data Management) posts is Rs. 22100/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Engineer post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required for the Field Engineer post is a Diploma in Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attend a Walk-in Interview. They should report to the specified venue with all required documents on the interview date.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates (if applicable) are also required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Resubelpara, Meghalaya. The exact venue address will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MSWWDA North Garo Hills?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for MSWWDA North Garo Hills recruitment is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.
